overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a neon-lit underground black market. The player walks through a dystopian commercial area featuring food stalls, a bar with an 'El Guapo' billboard, back rooms with squatters, and ends at a weapons vendor. The environment features heavy industrial concrete architecture with vibrant neon signage and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market entrance corridor with food stalls

events.description: moves from dark alley entrance into the covered market interior
passes under bright overhead fluorescent lights at the bar area

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the market entrance, passing trash piles on the left and approaching the bar area

notable_agents.action: distant figures standing near the back of the market corridor

entered.detail: large pile of garbage bags and debris stacked against the left wall at the entrance
market stall with bright lighting and goods displayed on counters
long wooden bar with stools and bright overhead strip lighting
two large wooden barrels sitting in the middle of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark alley entrance with trash piles, transitioning into a covered market corridor. The player walks past food stalls on the right toward a bar area with bright overhead lighting. Wooden barrels sit in the center of the path as the environment opens slightly into the main market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial area with large billboard and vending machines

events.description: large illuminated 'EL GUAPO' billboard becomes visible, casting green and white light

agents.ego_description: walking past the bar area toward the El Guapo billboard, observing the storefront displays

notable_agents.action: person standing near the vending machines looking at merchandise

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'EL GUAPO NEED FOR SPEED' with a stylized animal graphic
row of automated vending machines with glowing product displays
tables and chairs set up for dining near the storefronts

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a commercial section dominated by a massive 'EL GUAPO' billboard. Vending machines line the left wall while seating areas appear on the right. The lighting shifts to vibrant neon as the player approaches the back corridor entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: back rooms with squatters and makeshift barriers

events.description: enters darker back corridor away from the main commercial area
lighting dims significantly to warm amber tones as entering the squatters' area

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit back rooms, passing by NPCs sitting against walls near cardboard shelters

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on the ground leaning against a cardboard box
figure sitting in the corner near medical equipment

entered.detail: white dress mannequin torso on a stand near the corridor entrance
concrete block wall covered in black spray paint graffiti tags
stacked cardboard boxes forming a makeshift wall with 'ASAP' written on them

segments.scene_description: The player enters a darker, more confined back area with makeshift cardboard shelters and graffiti-covered walls. The lighting shifts to warm amber tones. Several NPCs are seen sitting on the floor in this squatters' area as the player navigates through the debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical clinic and kitchen storage area

events.description: enters kitchen area with distinct red ambient lighting from overhead fixtures

agents.ego_description: walking through a medical area with equipment and shelves, then entering a red-lit kitchen space

entered.detail: medical monitors and devices on tables suggesting an improvised clinic
metal shelving units with kitchen supplies and red tiled backsplash
tall metal racks filled with boxes and supplies in a storage room

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a makeshift medical clinic with equipment and monitors, transitioning into a kitchen area with distinctive red lighting and metal shelving. The environment becomes more industrial with storage racks and utility fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: main market hall with multiple vendor stalls

events.description: exits storage area and re-enters the main market hall with bright neon lighting
lighting shifts from dark amber back to vibrant blue and red neon

agents.ego_description: walking through the main market area, passing various stalls and vendors under bright neon signs

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a stall with an 'OPEN' neon sign

entered.detail: wall covered with multiple identical posters showing faces
commercial stall with bright lighting and merchandise displays
metal staircase with green painted structure leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the back rooms into a large open market hall with vibrant neon lighting. A wall with multiple posters is visible on the right, while market stalls line the left. The environment becomes busier with more NPCs and commercial activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: weapons vendor area with police barriers

events.description: slows down and stops at the weapons vendor counter

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping at the weapons vendor, examining the merchandise on display

notable_agents.action: weapons vendor standing behind the counter with arms crossed

entered.detail: display racks holding various firearms and melee weapons for sale
blue police vehicle or barrier with 'POLICE' text visible behind the vendor

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player approaching a weapons vendor in a semi-enclosed area. Weapon racks display various firearms on the right, while a police barrier is visible behind the vendor. The player slows to a stop in front of the vendor character to examine the merchandise.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty alleyway through the claustrophobic depths of a black market before emerging into a vibrant commercial hub. It begins by moving past trash piles and food stalls into a covered corridor, where the space opens up beneath a massive, glowing El Guapo billboard and rows of vending machines. The camera then shifts into a confined, amber-lit back area filled with graffiti and cardboard shelters, transitioning through a makeshift medical clinic and a red-lit industrial kitchen. As the player emerges from these cramped quarters, the environment expands into a bustling open market hall defined by bright neon signage and crowded stalls. The movement finally slows as the camera approaches a weapons vendor, coming to a halt before racks of firearms and a police barrier.
